name: Lemon Chiffon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a pie plate over high for 30-45 seconds.
2. Combine graham crumbs and spices; add to the pie plate and mix well with a fork.
3. Spread mixture evenly over the bottom of the pie plate.
4. Microwave at high for 3-5 minutes, watching carefully to prevent scorching. Allow to cool before filling.
5. In a bowl, sprinkle gelatin on 1/2 cup water; let soften.
6. In another bowl, combine egg yolks, sugar, lemon peel, salt, and 1/4 cup lemon juice. Microwave at medium for 5-8 minutes until mixture boils, stirring every 2 minutes.
7. Add softened gelatin, sweetener, and mix well. Refrigerate until slightly thickened.
8. Beat egg whites, powdered milk, ice water, and 1 tablespoon lemon juice until stiff.
9. Carefully fold the gelatin mixture into the egg whites.
10. Pour into the crust; refrigerate for 2 hours before serving.
Each serving is 1/8 pie, 1 starch, 1 fat choice with 15g carbs, 4g protein, 5g fat, and 115 calories.
